items.title: skills
items.description: Agent Skills for real engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.
items.description_zh: 真正工程师的代理技能。直接来自我的 .claude 目录。

items.title: free-claude-code
items.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
items.description_zh: 在终端、VSCode 扩展中或通过 openclaw 等 Discord 免费使用 claude-code

items.title: hackingtool
items.description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers
items.description_zh: 黑客的多合一黑客工具

items.title: GitNexus
items.description: GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
items.description_zh: GitNexus：零服务器代码智能引擎 - GitNexus 是一个完全在浏览器中运行的客户端知识图创建器。放入 GitHub 存储库或 ZIP 文件，即可获得带有内置 Graph RAG 代理的交互式知识图。非常适合代码探索

items.title: posthog
items.description: 🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
items.description_zh: 🦔 PostHog 是一个用于构建成功产品的一体化开发者平台。我们提供产品分析、网络分析、会话重播、错误跟踪、功能标记、实验、调查、数据仓库、CDP 和 AI 产品助手，以帮助调试您的代码、更快地发布功能，并将您的所有使用情况和客户数据保存在一个堆栈中。

items.title: typescript-go
items.description: Staging repo for development of native port of TypeScript
items.description_zh: 用于开发 TypeScript 本机端口的临时存储库

items.title: cua
items.description: Open-source infrastructure for Computer-Use Agents. Sandboxes, SDKs, and benchmarks to train and evaluate AI agents that can control full desktops (macOS, Linux, Windows).
items.description_zh: 计算机使用代理的开源基础设施。用于训练和评估可控制完整桌面（macOS、Linux、Windows）的 AI 代理的沙箱、SDK 和基准测试。

items.title: beads
items.description: Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent
items.description_zh: Beads - 编码代理的内存升级

items.title: curl
items.description: A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features
items.description_zh: 用于使用 URL 语法传输数据的命令行工具和库，支持 DICT、FILE、FTP、FTPS、GOPHER、GOPHERS、HTTP、HTTPS、IMAP、IMAPS、LDAP、LDAPS、MQTT、MQTTS、POP3、POP3S、RTMP、RTMPS、RTSP、SCP、SFTP、SMB、SMBS、SMTP、SMTPS、TELNET、TFTP、WS 和 WSS。 libcurl 提供了无数强大的功能

items.title: core
items.description: 🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.
items.description_zh: 🏡 开源家庭自动化，将本地控制和隐私放在首位。

items.title: build-your-own-x
items.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
items.description_zh: 通过从头开始重新创建您最喜欢的技术来掌握编程。

items.title: openclaw
items.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
items.description_zh: 您自己的私人人工智能助理。任何操作系统。任何平台。龙虾方式。 🦞

items.title: awesome-codex-skills
items.description: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.
items.description_zh: 用于跨 Codex CLI 和 API 实现工作流程自动化的实用 Codex 技能精选列表。
